about.en: Cosmos is an ecosystem of interoperable blockchains connected by the IBC protocol. ATOM is used for staking and governance.
about.es: Cosmos es un ecosistema de blockchains interoperables conectadas por el protocolo IBC. ATOM se usa para staking (staking) y gobernanza (governance).
about.ca: Cosmos és un ecosistema de blockchains interoperables connectades pel protocol IBC. ATOM s'utilitza per a staking (staking) i governança (governance).
